title: Kyraton Stainless Steel Spatulas Set, Silver Slotted Turner, Solid Turner, Kitchen Spatulas for Nonstick Cookware, Dishwasher Safe, Easy to Clean
features: Stainless steel material: This set of spatulas is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is durable and corrosion-resistant, allowing for long-term use without rusting.

Two-piece design: Each set includes two types of spatulas. One is a slotted silver spatula, suitable for stirring ingredients during cooking. The other is a solid-designed kitchen spatula that can easily flip food.
Multi-functional use: These kitchen spatulas are perfect for use on non-stick coated pans. They can easily flip, move, and stir food without scratching or damaging the surface of your cookware.
Dishwasher safe: For convenience in cleaning, these kitchen tools can be safely placed in the dishwasher for washing. You don't need to spend time and effort hand-washing them.

Easy to clean: Due to their smooth surface and high-quality stainless steel material, these kitchen tools are very easy to clean. Simply rinse with warm water and soap to quickly restore their clean and shiny appearance.
